item.title: Megara Cosplay
item.description:
SnarkyJayCosplay here— finally did a photo shoot as my favorite Disney leading lady: Megara. This is the first wig I styled (actually splicing together a wig, ponytail clip, etc) so I’m really proud!
Reference photo.

item.dc:creator: AjKaramba

item.title: Meh meh and stoof
item.description:
My parents got a new kitten that looks like this cat, he's a cute little murder machine.
The clock in my car is only right half the year. I won't have to worry soon I guess.
Mine is pink.
They're sooo cute.
This post is also not approved by the vatican.
I sent this to my gbff, he's a short king.
Ew, nickleback.
My team would have a mimikyu.
Let's goooo
My partner and I make cat noises across the house to each other.
I never hit my slut era, who knows what my future will be like.
So much dumb, in such a modest ass.
I've cried so much over so many pets, it all worth the time I had with them.
I'm finally finding myself in my 30s.
My grandma is a crazy bitch, my mom is pretty nutty, it's not looking good for my sister and I.
Think of all the toe beans.
I love my furry monsters.
My parents new cat, Dash. My niece named him, and it fits.
item.dc:creator: wonkysaurusrex

item.title: "End Hedge Fund Control of American Homes Act" introduced in both the US House and Senate
item.description:
Link to Vice article: https://www.vice.com/en/article/jg5nex/congress-members-push-to-ban-hedge-funds-private-equity-from-buying-family-homes
Link to BNN article: https://bnnbreaking.com/world/us/congressional-democrats-propose-bill-to-curb-hedge-fund-control-over-us-homes/ Link to 'End Hedge Fund Control of American Homes Act' pdf: https://adamsmith.house.gov/_cache/files/4/e/4e6f30ad-c8f0-438d-9b6f-99f4093b1162/57491D49DB8A7DE1F076D17C08DB4F2F.2023-end-hedge-fund-control-of-american-homes-act.pdf

item.title: Indeed.
item.description: Source: https://old.reddit.com/r/PublicFreakout/comments/18kv8bq/a_true_mic_drop_moment_at_a_moms_for_liberty/ Fox puppets laying out how to steal an election before actively commanding it: https://imgur.com/gallery/sQzDOlI Pardons for criminals, by criminals: https://www.justice.gov/pardon/pardons-granted-president-donald-j-trump-2017-2021 Brought to you by: "The best people" https://imgur.com/gallery/5k3JHlE https://imgur.com/gallery/9zDDKFT (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/LPyUdYF (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/7wxyNys (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/taJZoC7 (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/VdkqbFS (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/YlAGDFN (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/8GHlxoG (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/8VGDY8w (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/hYduSMS (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/3uhtTUq (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/JJzITny (continued) FULL LIST: https://www.dailykos.com/history/user/CajsaLilliehook Don't forget Gweggy! https://imgur.com/gallery/ddZqpFD More from Texas: https://imgur.com/gallery/NNRExX2 Also in Texas: https://imgur.com/gallery/prqm2cq Also in Texas (update provided by: UnknownParticipant67): https://www.chron.com/neighborhood/moco/news/article/texas-right-to-life-luke-bowen-prison-solicit-teen-17788511.php That's a lot of lawsuits! https://www.azcentral.com/pages/interactives/trump-lawsuits/ Indictment 3: https://imgur.com/gallery/JQ99Kxu Follow the progress of indictment 3 against the terrorist! https://www.courtlistener.com/docket/67656604/united-states-v-trump/ Indictment 4: https://imgur.com/gallery/Kq3qYbO
